title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: CLI and Go library to pull, build, and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and asyncio bindings for the Ollama API; install via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript / TypeScript client for Node & browsers; npm install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web)
summary: Popular open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama models; Docker one-liner deployment.

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Community Java/Kotlin SDK wrapping Ollama REST endpoints with builders & streaming.

title: ollama-cli – Rust TUI
summary: Rust-based terminal UI for interactive chatting with Ollama models; keyboard driven.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code Extension
summary: Free Copilot alternative: inline completions & chat sidebar powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-models (Hugging Face mirror)
summary: Official registry of Ollama Modelfiles hosted on Hugging Face; PR new models.

title: ollama-gui – Flutter Desktop/Mobile
summary: Cross-platform Flutter app for chatting with Ollama; runs on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET SDK
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-tools – Function-calling PoC
summary: Experimental repo demonstrating OpenAI-style function calling via Ollama chat completions.

title: ollama-dagger – CI Module
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service in CI pipelines for integration testing.

title: ollama-rag – Minimal RAG Stack
summary: Tiny Python RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-nim – Nim Client
summary: Lightweight Nimble package for interacting with Ollama from Nim language.

title: ollama-obsidian – Obsidian Plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM summarization & brainstorming inside notes.
